creator: karels@freebsd.org
text:
A couple of additional comments relative to the latest version:

/media contains no subdirectories by default.

It is probably also worth mentioning that /tmp may be re-created (empty) at boot time, e.g. tmpfs.  This is independent of clear_tmp_enable.

/usr/freebsd-dist is not installed; it is present on the ISO though.
